title: Section 139
content: No public servant or person duly appointed or authorised shall be liable to any penalty or to payment of any damages for giving effect in good faith to-- (a) any order or direction issued with apparent authority by the Administrator or by a person empowered in that behalf under this Act; or (b) any rule or regulation made under this Act. Explanation.-- In this section, the expression "public servant" has the meaning assigned to it in section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).
